title: Ride, Ranger, Ride
writer: Dorrell McGowan, Stuart E. McGowan, Bernard McConville
actors: Gene Autry, Smiley Burnette, Kay Hughes
plot: Gene Autry enters the Cavalry, where he attracts the Colonel's daughter. When a jealous Lieutenant conspires to send Gene into an ambush, Gene loses a man and his group is ousted from the army.
